ruleContent.content: var evalStr=src.match(/(eval.*\)\))/)[1] var match = evalStr.match(/eval\(function\(p,a,c,k,e,d\)\{.*?\}\('(.*?)',(\d+),(\d+),'(.*?)'\.split\('\|'\)/); var p = match[1]; var a = parseInt(match[2]); var c = parseInt(match[3]); var k = match[4].split('|'); var result = unpack(p, a, c, k, undefined, {}); eval(result); var imgTags = picTree.map(item => ``).join('\n'); imgTags;
